back_translation: These are the statutes and the ordinances that you must keep to do in the land that the Lord, God of your fathers, has given to you to possess, all the days that you live upon the ground.
Utterly destroying you shall destroy all the places where the nations whom you are dispossessing have served there their gods, on the high mountains and on the hills and under every green tree.

And you shall break down their altars, and you shall smash their pillars, and their Asherah poles you shall burn in the fire, and the carved images of their gods you shall cut down, and you shall destroy their name from that place.
You shall not do thus to the Lord your God.
But unto the place that the Lord your God will choose from all your tribes to put His name there, to His dwelling you shall seek, and you shall come there.

And you shall bring there your burnt offerings and your sacrifices and your tithes and the heave offering of your hand and your vow offerings and your freewill offerings and the firstborn of your herd and your flock.
And you shall eat there before the Lord your God, and you shall rejoice in all that your hand sends forth, you and your households, in that the Lord your God has blessed you.
You shall not do according to all that we are doing here today, each man all that is right in his eyes.
For you have not yet come until now to the resting place and to the inheritance that the Lord your God is giving to you.
And you shall cross the Jordan and dwell in the land that the Lord your God is causing you to inherit, and He will give you rest from all your enemies around about, and you shall dwell in safety.

And it shall be the place that the Lord your God will choose in it to cause His name to dwell there, there you shall bring all that I am commanding you: your burnt offerings and your sacrifices, your tithes and the heave offering of your hand, and every choice of your vow offerings that you vow to the Lord.

And you shall rejoice before the Lord your God, you and your sons and your daughters and your menservants and your maidservants, and the Levite who is in your gates, for he has no portion and inheritance with you.
Watch yourself, lest you offer up your burnt offerings in every place that you see.
But in the place that the Lord will choose in one of your tribes, there you shall offer up your burnt offerings, and there you shall do all that I am commanding you.

Only in all the desire of your soul you may slaughter and eat meat, according to the blessing of the Lord your God that He has given to you in all your gates; the unclean and the clean may eat it, as the gazelle and as the deer.
Only the blood you shall not eat; on the ground you shall pour it like water.

You shall not be able to eat in your gates the tithe of your grain and your new wine and your oil, and the firstborn of your herd and your flock, and all your vow offerings that you vow, and your freewill offerings and the heave offering of your hand.

But before the Lord your God you shall eat it in the place that the Lord your God will choose in it, you and your son and your daughter and your manservant and your maidservant, and the Levite who is in your gates, and you shall rejoice before the Lord your God in all that your hand sends forth.
Watch yourself, lest you forsake the Levite all your days upon your ground.
When the Lord your God enlarges your border as He has spoken to you, and you say: I will eat meat, because your soul craves to eat meat, in all the desire of your soul you may eat meat.

When the place that the Lord your God will choose to put His name there will be far from you, then you may slaughter from your herd and from your flock that the Lord has given to you, as I have commanded you, and you shall eat in your gates in all the desire of your soul.
Indeed, just as the gazelle and the deer are eaten, so you may eat it; the unclean and the clean together may eat it.
Only be strong not to eat the blood, for the blood, it is the life, and you shall not eat the life with the meat.
You shall not eat it; on the ground you shall pour it like water.
You shall not eat it, so that it may go well with you and with your children after you, when you do what is right in the eyes of the Lord.
Only your holy things that will be to you and your vow offerings, you shall lift up and come to the place that the Lord will choose.

And you shall offer your burnt offerings, the meat and the blood, on the altar of the Lord your God, and the blood of your sacrifices shall be poured on the altar of the Lord your God, and the meat you shall eat.

Keep and listen to all these words that I am commanding you, so that it may go well with you and with your children after you forever, when you do what is good and right in the eyes of the Lord your God.
When the Lord your God cuts off the nations from before you, whom you are entering there to possess them from before you, and you possess them and dwell in their land,

watch yourself, lest you be ensnared after them, after their being destroyed from before you, and lest you inquire about their gods, saying: How do these nations serve their gods? And I will do likewise also I.
You shall not do thus to the Lord your God, for every abomination of the Lord that He hates they do for their gods, for even their sons and their daughters they burn in the fire for their gods.
